name: Menu

semanticTypeCandidates.evidence: Contextual menu triggered by button or icon, used for row-level actions and overflow options
Right-click or overflow-triggered menu with item list and dividers
Menu used as select dropdown alternative with checkmark on selected item

representativeVariants.name: Default Dropdown Menu
representativeVariants.whySelected: Core menu pattern — flat surface with hairline border, orange selected state, shadow-3 elevation
representativeVariants.childrenDigest: Menu items (vertical list, each padding var(--space-2) var(--space-4)): 编辑 (default hover state), 复制, 删除 (danger color). Each item 32px height.

representativeVariants.name: Menu with Icons
representativeVariants.whySelected: Icon-led menu items — common in dashboard overflow menus and row actions
representativeVariants.childrenDigest: Menu items with leading 16px icon + label: 导出 (download icon), 导入 (upload icon), divider, 设置 (settings icon), 禁用 item (disabled style)

representativeVariants.name: Menu with Selected State
representativeVariants.whySelected: Selected/checked menu item — orange accent for active option, used as select replacement
representativeVariants.childrenDigest: Menu items where selected item shows orange text + primary-container background: 全部 (default), 活跃 (selected: orange text, primary-container bg, check icon right), 草稿, 已完成

anatomy.description: Flat surface with 1px hairline border, radius-md, shadow-3 elevation, min-width 160px
Single-line menu item, 32px height, padding var(--space-2) var(--space-4), flex row with optional leading icon
1px hairline divider between item groups, margin var(--space-1) 0
Check icon (16px) on right side for selected items, or primary-container background + orange text

structurePatterns: Container: flex column, padding var(--space-1) 0, overflow hidden
Item: flex row, align center, gap var(--space-3), height 32px, padding 0 var(--space-4)
Item selected: color var(--color-primary), background var(--color-primary-container)
Divider: border-top 1px solid var(--color-border), margin var(--space-1) 0

bestPractices: Trigger via button click, overflow icon, or right-click
Use dividers to separate action groups (view vs. destructive)
Selected state for filter/select menus — orange accent signals active option
Danger items (delete) use error color, place at bottom after divider
Close on outside click or Escape key

doNotInvent: Multi-level nested submenus (not in spec — keep single level)
Search/filter input inside menu (not in spec)
Heavy shadows beyond shadow-3 (menus float, not modal)
unknowns: Menu width is content-driven — min-width 160px, max-width 280px
Position relative to trigger — render as inline static preview
keyInsightSeed: Flat dropdown with hairline border and shadow-3, orange selected state via primary-container tint
